query: CI headless run: /docs-steward auto on this monorepo with Docusaurus and MkDocs; prompts are disabled.
expected_behavior: Agent detects multiple frameworks and recognizes non-interactive/headless execution constraints
Agent applies Headless Fallback Contract and runs read-only Maintain in matrix style across detected frameworks
Agent processes frameworks in deterministic order and emits a headless fallback warning
Agent skips mutating modes until an explicit framework target is provided
